summary: Asian markets remain under pressure from geopolitical tensions. Strait of Hormuz situation continues to impact energy volatility. Art Basel Hong Kong previews are commencing.
key_events: Asian markets: Continued pressure due to geopolitical instability.
Energy: Strait of Hormuz supply concerns impacting Brent crude pricing.
Art Basel Hong Kong: Previews beginning; market resilience tested.

[시장 동향] 
아시아 증시 전반 하락세 지속. 지정학적 리스크로 인한 에너지 가격 변동성 확대.

[아트 마켓]
Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 프리뷰 시작. 금융 시장 불안에도 불구하고 아트 마켓으로의 자금 이동은 여전히 주목받는 중.

LiveUpdate.raw: Asian markets remain pressured by geopolitical tensions. Strait of Hormuz developments continue to impact energy prices. Art Basel Hong Kong previews commence tomorrow.
